zh-CN.title: 未来将支持 16 道情境判断模块
zh-CN.description: 当前报告基于 EQ-60 自我报告。未来 EQ-SJT 16 会补充你在反馈、冲突、边界和压力情境中的选择方式。
zh-CN.what_it_adds: 它用于补充 self-report，帮助比较自我感知与情境选择之间的一致和差距。
zh-CN.what_it_is_not: 它不是 MSCEIT，不是认证能力测验，也不用于招聘筛选或临床判断。

en.title: A 16-item scenario module is planned
en.description: The current report is based on EQ-60 self-report. A future EQ-SJT 16 module will add how you choose responses in feedback, conflict, boundary, and pressure situations.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report by comparing self-perception with scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not MSCEIT, not a certified ability assessment, and not for hiring or clinical decisions.
